name: Add Tag Button
notes: onClick fires handleAdd(); also triggered by Enter key in the tag input via handleKeyPress (line 94).
Adds the trimmed input to local tags state only if: (a) non-empty after trim, (b) not already present in tags, (c) tags.length < 10.
No API call — modifies local React state only; the tag is not persisted until the user clicks Save Tags.
maxLength={50} on the input element provides a secondary guard on tag length, but handleAdd itself does not enforce a character-count limit.
